zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey de Bohun V於1223年8月6日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛時，他的父親Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun15歲，母親Maud de Lusignan14歲。他於1247年2月15日與Eleanor de Braose在威爾士布雷康史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1278年被列為constable of england。他去世於1265年10月27日在英國爾貝斯頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國爾可姆莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey de Bohun V于1223年8月6日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛时，他的父亲Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun15岁，母亲Maud de Lusignan14岁。他于1247年2月15日与Eleanor de Braose在威尔士布雷康史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1278年被列为constable of england。他去世于1265年10月27日在英国爾貝斯頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国爾可姆莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey de Bohun V was born on 6 August 1223, in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, his father, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, was 15 and his mother, Maud de Lusignan, was 14. He married Eleanor de Braose on 15 February 1247, in Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1278, his occupation is listed as constable of england. He died on 27 October 1265, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Combermere Abbey, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey de Bohun V est né le 6 août 1223, à Loughborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lusignan, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Braose le 15 février 1247, à Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1278, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of england. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1265, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Combermere Abbey, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.Caundle Haddon, Dorset, England: Stourton Caundle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey de Bohun V am 6. August 1223 in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun 15 und seine Mutter Maud de Lusignan 14. Er hat am 15. Februar 1247 in Breconshire, Wales Eleanor de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1278 ist sein Beruf als constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1265 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Beeston, Cheshire, England und wurde in Combermere Abbey, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey de Bohun V è nato il il 6 agosto 1223 nel Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Lusignan, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Braose il 15 febbraio 1247, nel Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1278, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of england. Morì il 27 ottobre 1265, nel Beeston, Cheshire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Combermere Abbey, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun Vが1223年8月6日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアロウボロウで生まれた時，父Earl Humphrey IV de Bohunは15歳，母Maud de Lusignanは14歳であった。1247年2月15日にウェールズブレコンシュアイアでEleanor de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1278年，職業はconstable of englandと記録されている。彼は1265年10月27日にイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで42歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアコンバーメア アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun V(이)가 1223년 8월 6일 영국 레이스스터실르 루그h버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Lusignan(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1247년 2월 15일 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Eleanor de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1278년, 그의 직업은 constable of england이었다. 그는 1265년 10월 27일 영국 체실르 브이스턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 코버머 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey de Bohun V nasceu em 6 de agosto de 1223, em Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Lusignan, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Braose em 15 de fevereiro de 1247, em Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1278, sua profissão aparece como constable of england. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1265, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Combermere Abbey, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Caundle Haddon, Dorset, England: Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey de Bohun V родился 6 августа 1223 г. в местности лоугбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lusignan, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Braose 15 февраля 1247 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1278 году он работал по профессии constable of england. Он умер 27 октября 1265 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности комбирмир эбби, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey de Bohun V nació el 6 de agosto de 1223, en Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Maud de Lusignan, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Braose el 15 de febrero de 1247, en Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1278, su ocupación registrada era constable of england. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1265, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Combermere Abbey, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
